title: Toni's 3D Pink Petals & Wildflowers
description: 3D model for Pink Petals and Wildflowers
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eff73e39fcc0cf72153929d432048077e9a0408e.png)
## Toni's 3D Pink Petals & Wildflowers

**Toni's 3D Pink Petals & Wildflowers** is a resource pack that transforms the flat, 2D models of Pink Petals and Wildflowers into detailed and visually appealing 3D versions.

### 🌸 Features
- **3D Pink Petals**
- **3D Wildflowers**
- Uses the **minecraft textures**

### ✅ Compatibility
- Works with other texture pack that modifies the concerned tetures
